summary: Released v2.3.4: planning phases use dated folders (audit-log.md + plan.md inside), study-logs/ is owner-only with agent rule, plan:gate defaults plan-id to latest folder. README/CHANGELOG bumped. smoke:gates passes. npm publish may need login.

narrative: Planning layout: work-log/planning/{NNN}_{date}_{time}_{slug}/ with audit-log.md, plan.md, optional design.md
study-logs/ for owner portfolio notes; study-logs-user-only.mdc blocks agents
plan:finalize and plan:gate resolve folder layout; legacy flat paths still work
Package version 2.3.4; root + template README updated

decisions.decision: Dated plan folders with fixed inner filenames
decisions.rationale: Each phase is self-contained; slug in folder name summarizes topic
alternativesRejected: Flat audit-log_* files at planning root
decisions.tradeoff: Extra folder depth; legacy flat files supported via resolver

tradeoffs: Legacy flat planning files still resolve but new work should use folders
improvements: Clear separation of planning audit logs vs owner study logs
plan-id defaults to folder name without extra CLI flag
risks: Existing manifests pointing at flat paths need re-finalize after migration
followUps: npm publish --access public after npm login
